emails.subject: Re: Meter #: 1266 ; August 2000 / Allocation Exception
emails.body: Re: Meter 1266 August 2000 Allocation Exception Should I roll this deal to cover August 2000 activity Volumes todate are as follows: 82mm 8/16 85mm 8/17 65mm 8/18 57mm 8/19 60mm 8/20 Sitara ticket 363514 These small meter flows are causing allocation exceptions for August. Forwarded by Robert E Lloyd/HOU/ECT on 08/21/2000 01:27 PM From: Robert E Lloyd 08/11/2000 03:17 PM

emails.subject: Re: Meter #: 1266 ; August 2000 / Allocation Exception
emails.body: Conoco has nominated 5.0/d at this meter. Conoco transport can be allocated the entire meter flow for the days in which the meter flow exceed 5.0mm because they are the only party doing business at the meter. HPL may also be able to extract a sell for this overage which is why I wanted you to be aware of the daily activity thus far. Forwarded by Robert E Lloyd/HOU/ECT on 08/21/2000 01:57 PM From: Lee L Papayoti on 08/21/2000 01:44 PM
